raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Week three check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind at work this week, Sam?","description":"Safe opener that lets Sam set context before any friction is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"First-ticket shape","name":"What has felt clearest about your current tickets?","description":"Surfaces which parts of the work map are already forming and where the onboarding picture is solid.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Unclear expectations","name":"What part of the bar for a good ticket is still fuzzy?","description":"Gets at expectation gaps without sounding evaluative or abstract.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Handshake gaps","name":"Where do handoffs still leave you missing context?","description":"Finds specific points in the workflow where ownership or information drops away.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Shipping hesitation","name":"What usually makes you pause before shipping?","description":"Distinguishes confidence, tooling, and process reasons behind late reassurance-seeking.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tool friction","name":"Which part of the toolchain slows you down most right now?","description":"Identifies practical friction that may be creating avoidable hesitation or rework.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Independence support","name":"What support from me would help you ship with less second-guessing?","description":"Surfaces the manager touchpoint that would reduce reassurance dependence over the next two weeks.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Confidence pattern","name":"When do you feel most certain about a change being ready?","description":"Looks for conditions that build confidence so the manager can reinforce them.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support cadence","name":"What kind of check-in cadence would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Helps line up the right amount of support without over-managing.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next focus","name":"Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Closes on a concrete next step and lets Sam choose the most useful immediate priority.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
